sentiment.reasoning: Record quarterly revenue growth of 5% indicates solid operational performance and positive momentum.

sentiment.reasoning: An investor day focused on strategy is a neutral event intended to communicate future plans rather than immediate financial results.

sentiment.reasoning: A 20% margin improvement is a significant positive indicator of increased profitability and operational efficiency.

headlines.headline: Jovor Networks files routine patent applications in data analytics

headlines.headline: Brevon Microchips sees 8% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: An 8% drop in new customer orders is a clear negative signal regarding demand and future revenue growth.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
